description: Go for this t-shirt which has been specially crafted for football lovers, who would want to wear their favourite sport on them! The USP of this t-shirt has to be the graphic image on the front of the T-shirt, which is neither too pristine nor too hazy, giving the T-shirt a stylish look.Is there anyone out there who wouldn't wear a T-shirt? Hmm...Well it's a no-brainer that everyone simply loves t-shirts. It's the one outfit that make you look every bit cool, casual and chic. t-shirts are inherently appealing with its colours, designs and versatility. They can be worn for any occasion- anytime, anywhere. T-shirts are available in various fits and sizes for men. Its a great casual wear that keeps you comfortable all day. The ease of use and long lasting nature of t-shirts make it a favourite wear for one and all. Get into a t-shirt, close your eyes and you will realize it feels really good. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in T-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5"
